issues.description: GiveDon action is incomplete. 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active' requires specifying source='Deck' and the action should reflect adding/setting active, not just giving DON. Standard practice: use GiveDon with source context or clarify the mechanic.

Duplicate 'Trigger' effect with identical GiveDon action appears to be erroneous. The card text describes a single effect chain (K.O., then add DON), not two separate triggers. The second effect should be removed.
